testcase.name: test_appuntamento_materia_id_hydration

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'Geografia' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4930ab7980>('materia_descrizione') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4930ab7980> = {'al': '12:00', 'cliente_id': '14e7b9dc-663d-4b86-925b-30e3fe24134b', 'cliente_nome': 'Pasquale Della Porta', 'created_at': '2026-06-29T16:05:54.184482Z', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9_tipologia.py:234: in test_appuntamento_materia_id_hydration assert a.get("materia_descrizione") == materia_desc E AssertionError: assert None == 'Geografia' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4930ab7980>('materia_descrizione') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff4930ab7980> = {'al': '12:00', 'cliente_id': '14e7b9dc-663d-4b86-925b-30e3fe24134b', 'cliente_nome': 'Pasquale Della Porta', 'created_at': '2026-06-29T16:05:54.184482Z', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_super_admin_create_studio_tipologia

failure.message:
AssertionError: BUG: POST /api/studios non persiste tipologia. Got: centro_studi assert 'centro_studi' == 'studio_legale'
- studio_legale + centro_studi

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter9_tipologia.py:377: in test_super_admin_create_studio_tipologia assert r.json().get("tipologia") == "studio_legale", \ E AssertionError: BUG: POST /api/studios non persiste tipologia. Got: centro_studi E assert 'centro_studi' == 'studio_legale' E E - studio_legale E + centro_studi
